page.name: access_rights

div.style: color: #888; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #f8f6f7; border-radius: 6px; border-left: 3px solid #714B67;

page.div: AI Assistant Access: Scroll down to the Other section to set the AI Assistant access level. Leave blank for No Access (AI Assistant will be completely hidden for this user).
